turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there. I need to see a urologist. My husband has been having some trouble, uh, you know... kidney stone suspicion.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, I understand. Let me help you book. What's your husband's name and a contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. Our urologist Dr. Kishore Jog is available Wednesday at 10 AM and Friday at 3 PM. Any preference?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Booked! Vishal Phule, Wednesday at 10:00 AM with Dr. Kishore Jog. If he has any recent ultrasound reports please bring those along.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: He does have one. Will bring it. Thank you.
